summary: Iteration 16: Frontend-only testing of 3 UI/UX improvements (sticky header, sidebar collapse, content max-width). All 6 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Sticky header: Header section (Customer info, Quick Capture, tabs) stays fixed with flex-shrink-0 class while content scrolls
Sidebar collapse: Clicking collapse button shrinks sidebar to w-14 (icons only) - verified via class check
Sidebar expand: Clicking menu icon expands sidebar back to w-48 (full width) - verified via class check
Content max-width: Found 3 elements with max-w-5xl mx-auto class (header row, Quick Capture, content area)
Scroll container: Tab content area has flex-1 overflow-y-auto for vertical scrolling
Quick Capture inputs: Name field has max-w-[120px] constraint as specified
critical_code_review_comments: AppSidebar.jsx: isCollapsed state toggles between w-14 (collapsed) and w-48 (expanded) correctly
AppSidebar.jsx Line 33: Sidebar uses transition-all duration-300 for smooth collapse/expand animation
CustomerDetail.jsx Line 745: Main container uses flex flex-col h-[calc(100vh-60px)] for proper height calculation
CustomerDetail.jsx Line 748: Header section uses flex-shrink-0 bg-background to stay fixed
CustomerDetail.jsx Line 813: Content area uses flex-1 overflow-y-auto for scrollable content
CustomerDetail.jsx Lines 750, 796, 815: Content constrained with max-w-5xl mx-auto w-full
CustomerDetail.jsx Line 294: Entry name input has max-w-[120px] constraint
App.js Line 25: Main content area has md:ml-48 for sidebar offset
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI/UX improvements verified working: 1) Sticky header with flex-shrink-0 keeps Customer info, Quick Capture, and tabs fixed while content scrolls. 2) Sidebar collapse/expand toggles between w-14 (icons) and w-48 (full) using isCollapsed state. 3) Content constrained with max-w-5xl mx-auto, Quick Capture name input has max-w-[120px].

sticky_header.implementation: flex-shrink-0 bg-background on header section, flex-1 overflow-y-auto on content area
sticky_header.details: Header stays at y=127 position even after scrolling content

sidebar_collapse.implementation: isCollapsed state toggles w-14 class, hides text labels with conditional rendering
sidebar_collapse.details: Clicking collapse button changes sidebar from w-48 to w-14

sidebar_expand.implementation: isCollapsed state toggles w-48 class, shows text labels
sidebar_expand.details: Clicking menu icon changes sidebar from w-14 to w-48

content_max_width.implementation: max-w-5xl mx-auto w-full on header row, Quick Capture, and content area
content_max_width.details: Found 3 elements with max-w-5xl mx-auto class

scroll_container.implementation: flex-1 overflow-y-auto on content container below tabs
scroll_container.details: Only tab content area scrolls, header remains fixed

quick_capture_input_constraint.details: Name input constrained within visual container
